facts.title: External notification integration exists
facts.description: The registration workflow sends validated account details to an external provider.
facts.evidence_text: The registration workflow sends validated account details to Email Provider.

assumptions.title: Provider failure needs a defined outcome
assumptions.description: A provisional failure outcome will be needed before the integration can be implemented.
assumptions.reason: The integration is explicit, while provider failure behavior is flagged as missing.
assumptions.evidence_text: The registration workflow sends validated account details to Email Provider.
assumptions.confirmation_question: What outcome should occur when Email Provider is unavailable?
